/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libctc_sigma.so.0 -o libctc_sigma.so.0.1.0 CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/arith.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/braid.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/branch.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/constants.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/ctc_sigma.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/encoder.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/field.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/fold.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/keccak.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/lehmer.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/permutation.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_shared.dir/src/sponge.c.o
